name: whisky-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by WhiskyChoy

plugins.name: claude-statusline
plugins.description: Custom terminal statusline showing directory, model, and color-coded context usage bar. Auto-installs jq on Windows via winget with Python fallback.

plugins.name: finalize-worktree
plugins.description: Commit all worktree changes, sync from main branch, run tests, and merge back. Use when done working in a git worktree.

plugins.name: lyria-audio
plugins.description: AI music generation CLI powered by Gemini Lyria (realtime streaming). Handles duration, BPM, brightness, density, scale, and MP3/WAV output.

plugins.name: cc0-audio
plugins.description: Search, download, and compress CC0/free-license audio from Freesound. FFmpeg compression presets, URL checking, and batch processing.
